zh-cn.intro_message_1: 左键点击[方框]内文字确认选择
zh-cn.intro_message_2: 鼠标悬停以获取额外信息
zh-cn.intro_message_3:
汇报BUG用DC链接：$link$
点击此按钮复制邀请链接
zh-cn.campaign_chalicedivers_tooltip:
A limited-scope campaign aimed at learning or experimenting with combat systems. Death no longer result in a game over.
Start the campaign with up to 2 additional companions chosen from a preset selection (Starting Option Companion is disabled in this campaign)
Limit: Player Character Origin must be Forest Dweller
Starting Gift Companion is disabled.

This is a parody of Bloodborne, with some more references from various ero-games.
zh-cn.campaign2_start_none_tooltip:
Begin with no extra companion, instead start with more resources.
All companions are recruitable in-game regardless of starting options.
zh-cn.campaign2_start_tadadada_dungeonwithgal_:
Begin with Monica & Yamemoto.
(from ダンジョンウィズガール by ただただ愚か)
zh-cn.campaign2_start_avantgarde_amelie_toolti:
Begin with Amelie
(from アメリ・ブランシェットは何度も堕ちる ～カレドニー魔法学院と繰り返す一週間～ by AVANTGARDE)
zh-cn.char_editor_tooltip_saveAsName:
点击修改对应名称

角色文件会被保存为 名字_中间名_姓氏.json，会覆盖重名角色，请注意
zh-cn.tooltip_originselection: 选择角色的起源（目前只实装了属性调整和种族限制等）和额外初始项（尚未实装）
zh-cn.tooltip_raceselection: 选择角色的种族和模板。二者分别提供属性调整。
zh-cn.char_editor_stats_title_tooltip: 右侧的4个数值为属性点数，可以通过下侧的按钮自由变更点数分配给哪个属性
zh-cn.char_editor_reroll_tooltip: 每个属性骰为3D6，最低3 最高18 期望值10.5
zh-cn.char_editor_reroll10_tooltip: 重投10次属性，保留总值最高的投掷结果
zh-cn.char_editor_maxroll_tooltip: 你是说，你全属性都骰出了18？！
zh-cn.char_editor_stats_racialmod_tooltip: 种族和模板提供的数值调整（如果有的话）
zh-cn.char_editor_stats_final_tooltip: 属性最终值（还未计算装备等其他调整）
zh-cn.char_editor_stats_modifier_tooltip: 属性调整值 (属性 / 2 - 5 向下取整)。计算其他属性数值时主要取用的对象
zh-cn.char_editor_appearance_tooltip:
角色的外观性别。该选项只决定角色外观，游戏中判定角色的互动性别时，会参考性别选项和角色的身体器官

具体内容请参考%%intro_button_editPref%% -> %%ui_prefs_button_contentSetting%% -> %%ui_prefs_gendersetting%%
zh-cn.tooltip_GenderAppearance_Male: You possess the characteristics of a male member of your race.
zh-cn.tooltip_GenderAppearance_Female: You possess the characteristics of a female member of your race.
zh-cn.tooltip_GenderAppearance_Ambiguous:
You could either be a male or a female member of your race. It's hard to tell.
Your appearance is considered to be male and female.
zh-cn.tooltip_GenderAppearance_Inhuman:
You are still humanoid, but your appearance does not look human-relatable at all.
Your appearance is considered to not be male nor female.
zh-cn.char_editor_bodydata_tooltip:
此处修改角色的身体模板数据。游戏开始后，会根据模板来生成具体的部位

%%ui_tooltip_trait_size%%
zh-cn.char_editor_derivedStats_tooltip:
All of the stat-based traits belongs to one of 4 stat attribute category.
Each trait has a score cost.

For all selected traits that belong to the same stat category, 
the total of their score must be lesser or equal to the corresponding stat's modifier value,
no limit on the number of traits chosen.

en-us.intro_message_1: Click on button to confirm selection
en-us.intro_message_3:
Discord link for bug report: $link$
Click button to copy invite link.
en-us.intro_message_3_safe: Please contact me via itch.io if you encountered any bug.
en-us.tooltip_highlight: This entry has no extra info
